title: Microtek International is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Microtek International is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Microtek International in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microtek International:
Microtek International is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microtek International!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
